headline: Egan-Jones Recommends WEX Shareholders Support Impactive Nominees in 2026 Director Election
summary: Egan-Jones released an analysis recommending that WEX shareholders vote FOR Kurt P. Adams, Ellen R. Alemany, and Lauren Taylor Wolfe using the WHITE universal proxy card at the Company's May 5, 2026 Annual Meeting. Egan-Jones further recommends that shareholders WITHHOLD votes from management nominees Melissa Smith, Daniel Callahan, James Groch, Derrick Roman, Stephen Smith, Susan Sobbott, and Nancy Altobello, while remaining unopposed to Aimee Cardwell and David Foss.

headline: Corpay (CPAY) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: Corpay (CPAY) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
